prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the visual style of the purple 'schedule' button from image 2 to the 'Donate Now' button, changing its color to match and adopting the same rounded shape for a distinct look.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the red 'Donate Now' button, located centrally within the hero section of the webpage, by applying the visual style of the purple 'schedule' button from image 2. Specifically, change its color to precisely match the purple hue of the 'schedule' button and reshape it to adopt its distinct rounded-corner rectangular form. The 'schedule' button in image 2 is found on the dark gray bar, to the right of the '30 & 31 January 2016' text.
objects: Hero section with forest fire background
"Your donation will help feed first responders" text
Purple, rounded-corner 'Donate Now' button in the hero section
Lower section with text "The Salvation Army exists..."
Lower section with text "LEARN HOW YOU CAN HELP"
Image thumbnails at the bottom (Help Rescue Christmas, LGBTQ Support, Disaster Relief, Homeless Shelters)
